creator: lynx.ripe@gmail.com
text:
After FreeBSD upgrade from 7.0-STABLE to 8.1-PRERELEASE on my ASUS M5A I've noticed that sound driver doesn't work anymore. I've built several HEAD kernels
and thus located the commit which has caused this problem. It was

http://svn.freebsd.org/viewvc/base?view=revision&revision=182999

I've included uuencoded .tgz (in order to fit into 100K limit) with the following files:

dmesg-0809131650 - 'dmesg -v' (kernel from sources csupped with tag=. date=2008.09.13.16.50.00, just before the commit)
sndstat-0809131650.txt - 'cat /dev/sndstat' result for this kernel

dmesg-0809131700 - 'dmesg -v' (kernel from sources csupped with tag=. date=2008.09.13.17.00.00, just after the commit)
sndstat-0809131700.txt - 'cat /dev/sndstat' result for this kernel

I'm ready to provide any additional info and/or try patches on this notebook.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Try to use the built-in sound controller of ASUS M5A under RELENG_8
